name: EasyPost
shortDescription: Shipping API integration for automating label purchasing, package tracking, and batch shipment processing across multiple carriers (USPS, UPS, FedEx, DHL). Supports addresses, parcels, pickups, insurance, international customs declarations, refunds, and webhook management.

actions.name: Create Address
actions.description: Creates a new address in EasyPost. Optionally verifies the address during creation to ensure deliverability.

actions.name: Get Address
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific saved address by its ID.

actions.name: Verify Address
actions.description: Verifies an existing address for deliverability and accuracy. Returns verification results including any suggested corrections.

actions.name: List Addresses
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all saved addresses associated with the EasyPost account.

actions.name: Create Parcel
actions.description: Creates a reusable parcel object defining package dimensions and weight for shipment creation.

actions.name: Get Parcel
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific parcel by its ID, including dimensions and weight.

actions.name: Create Customs Info
actions.description: Creates a customs declaration (with its line items) required for international shipments. Attach the returned ID when creating a shipment that crosses a border.

actions.name: Get Customs Info
actions.description: Retrieves an existing customs declaration by its ID, including its line items.

actions.name: Create Customs Item
actions.description: Creates a standalone customs line item describing one product for international shipping. Items are immutable once created. To include items in a customs declaration, add them directly in Create Customs Info instead - this standalone object is retrievable by ID only.

actions.name: Get Customs Item
actions.description: Retrieves an existing customs line item by its ID.

actions.name: Create Shipment
actions.description: Creates a new shipment with inline from/to addresses and parcel details. Returns the shipment with available carrier rates for purchasing.

actions.name: Create Shipment from Saved
actions.description: Creates a new shipment using previously saved address and parcel IDs. Returns the shipment with available carrier rates.

actions.name: Create and Buy Shipment
actions.description: Creates a shipment and purchases the label in a single step by naming the carrier service directly (e.g. NextDayAir, Priority) - no separate rate-selection step. Returns the shipment with tracking code and label already attached. Use the two-step Create Shipment + Buy Shipment when you want to compare rates first.

actions.name: Get Shipment
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific shipment, including addresses, parcel, rates, and tracking information.

actions.name: List Shipments
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all shipments associated with the EasyPost account.

actions.name: Buy Shipment
actions.description: Purchases a shipping label for a shipment at the selected rate. This is the primary method for buying postage.

actions.name: Convert Label Format
actions.description: Converts a purchased shipment label to a different file format (e.g. from PNG to PDF).

actions.name: Refund Shipment
actions.description: Requests a postage refund for a purchased shipment by its ID. USPS labels are refundable within 30 days if unscanned; UPS and FedEx within 90 days. The refund starts as "submitted" and the carrier confirms it asynchronously. Distinct from Create Refund, which refunds by carrier and tracking codes instead of a shipment ID.

actions.name: Create Tracker
actions.description: Creates a new tracking object for monitoring a package shipment across carriers. Tracking updates are generated automatically.

actions.name: Get Tracker
actions.description: Retrieves the full tracking details for a specific tracker, including all tracking events and estimated delivery date.

actions.name: List Trackers
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all trackers with optional filtering by tracking code or carrier.

actions.name: Delete Tracker
actions.description: Permanently deletes a tracker and its associated tracking data.

actions.name: Create Batch
actions.description: Creates a new batch for processing multiple shipments together. Optionally adds shipments to the batch during creation.

actions.name: Get Batch
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific batch, including its state and shipment information.

actions.name: List Batches
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all batches associated with the EasyPost account.

actions.name: Add Shipments to Batch
actions.description: Adds one or more shipments to an existing batch for bulk processing.

actions.name: Remove Shipments from Batch
actions.description: Removes one or more shipments from an existing batch.

actions.name: Buy Batch
actions.description: Purchases labels for all shipments in a batch. Each shipment must have a selected rate before buying.

actions.name: Generate Batch Label
actions.description: Generates a consolidated label document for all shipments in a purchased batch in the specified format.

actions.name: Create Pickup
actions.description: Schedules a carrier pickup for a shipment at the specified address and time window.

actions.name: Get Pickup
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific pickup including status, rates, and scheduling information.

actions.name: Buy Pickup
actions.description: Purchases a pickup at the specified carrier and service level. The pickup must have been created first.

actions.name: Cancel Pickup
actions.description: Cancels a previously scheduled carrier pickup. Once canceled, the carrier will not attempt collection.

actions.name: Create Insurance
actions.description: Creates a standalone insurance policy for a shipment with a specified coverage amount.

actions.name: Get Insurance
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific insurance policy, including status and coverage information.

actions.name: Refund Insurance
actions.description: Requests a refund for an existing insurance policy. The insurance must be in a refundable state.

actions.name: Create Refund
actions.description: Requests a postage refund for one or more shipments by providing the carrier and tracking codes.

actions.name: List Webhooks
actions.description: Retrieves all webhook endpoints configured on the EasyPost account, including whether each is active or disabled.

actions.name: Create Webhook
actions.description: Registers a URL to receive EasyPost event notifications (tracking updates, batch state changes, etc.). This manages the account's webhook endpoints; it does not create a FlowRunner trigger.

actions.name: Get Webhook
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific webhook endpoint, including whether it has been disabled.

actions.name: Update Webhook
actions.description: Updates a webhook endpoint's signing secret or custom delivery headers. The URL itself cannot be changed - delete and recreate the webhook to point elsewhere. Updating a disabled webhook re-enables it.

actions.name: Delete Webhook
actions.description: Permanently removes a webhook endpoint. EasyPost stops sending event notifications to its URL immediately.

idealUseCases: Automating label creation and purchase for e-commerce orders, including one-step buy
Tracking packages and notifying customers on status changes
Preparing customs declarations for international shipments
Processing bulk shipments in batches with consolidated labels
Scheduling pickups, insurance, and postage refunds
Registering webhook endpoints for account events
agentIdeas: When an **EasyPost** "On Tracking Updated" trigger fires "delivered", use **Gmail** "Send Message" to notify the customer.
Use **Google Sheets** "On New Row" to detect new orders, then call **EasyPost** "Create Shipment" and "Buy Shipment" to generate and purchase labels.
For international orders, call **EasyPost** "Create Customs Info" first, then pass its ID into "Create and Buy Shipment".
